publications.title: Differentially Private Graph Neural Networks: Shortest-Path Approximation
publications.details: Implements DP-SGD-trained GNNs on grid, wheel, and scale-free graphs; benchmarks path-length estimation accuracy, fairness gaps, and robustness under varying privacy budgets.

publications.title: Property-Level Analytics Engine for Atlanta Urban Risk Assessment
publications.details: Constructed tract-level database (N=311; 118k+ incidents) integrating crime, ACS, and built-environment features. Detected strong spatial autocorrelation (Moran's I = 0.559) and trained spatial models.
publications.venue: Center for Urban Resilience & Analytics, Georgia Tech

publications.title: Social Media Crime Sentiment Modeling: A BERT-Based Approach
publications.details: Collected 200k+ Reddit posts on crime; built NLP pipeline with BERT-based sentiment classifiers. Produced visualizations revealing negative sentiment spikes on weekday mornings/evenings.

publications.title: Agentic RAG System with NVIDIA NIM & LangChain
publications.details: Engineered an agentic RAG system with NVIDIA NIM-hosted LLaMA3-70B, document chunking, and FAISS retrieval. Implemented evaluation harnesses and deployed interactive demo.

publications.title: Multi-Agent RAG Chatbot for Youth Substance-Abuse Prevention (1st Place)
publications.details: Led development of multi-agent RAG chatbot integrating retrieval, summarization, and planning agents producing clinician-ready insights.
